channel.title: GitHub COBOL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of COBOL in GitHub

item.title: openmainframeproject/cobol-programming-course
item.description: Training materials and labs for a "Getting Started" level course on COBOL

item.title: aws-samples/aws-mainframe-modernization-carddemo
item.description: A comprehensive COBOL mainframe credit card management application designed to showcase AWS mainframe modernization technologies and migration patterns.
